name: &BThe Temple of the Goraks&n
description:
This is a dark and gloomy room... almost no light enters in this fearsome
place. A strong smell consumes the whole room... The reflects of the shadows, which
fullfills the room, reflects on the strong and silent statue, laid on the center
of the room. It is a quite strange being, probably their god.
   The exit to the Temple Street is to the South.
